caption: A security camera captures a grainy, low-light view of an outdoor ground surface, likely gravel or dirt, leading toward a paved area. In the background, a small white object, possibly a bottle, sits next to a thin metallic structure resembling a stool or stand. A dark figure partially enters the frame from the left edge, though only a portion of their body is visible. The scene remains largely static across the sequence, with minimal movement from the figure. In the bottom-left corner of each view, a small red and white overlay displays the text "Cam 04" next to a muted microphone icon. The overall image quality is blurry and muted in color, characteristic of a nighttime surveillance feed.
